when_to_use: Global ASO and paid UA for enterprise app brands across 9 international hubs

review.verdict: Global performance agency for brands with budget; not a tool, and not suited to lean startups.
review.best_for: Enterprise brands scaling apps across multiple regions
review.not_for: Indies or seed-stage startups with limited spend
